login.title: LLM Wiki
login.subtitle: Enterprise compiled knowledge vault with agent operating plane.

sources.title: Sources
sources.desc: Uploaded source documents that feed the compiler pipeline and agent citations.
sources.uploadDesc: Upload a source document to trigger an ingest run and compiled wiki update.
sources.formats: PDF, DOCX, XLSX, CSV, Markdown, HTML
sources.noWorkspace: No workspace found. Create one in Settings.

runs.title: Runs
runs.desc: Compiler, ingest, lint, query, and agent-edit runs are fully traceable.
runs.noRecentRuns: No recent runs in this workspace

vault.title: Vault Explorer
vault.desc: Unified document model for sources, system docs, wiki pages, and assets.
vault.notFoundDesc: The requested vault document does not exist or is not accessible.

search.title: Search
search.desc: Hybrid lexical + semantic + graph-aware retrieval across source blocks, wiki docs, and entities.
search.hint: Enter a query to search source blocks, semantic hits, and entity matches.

graph.title: Knowledge Graph
graph.desc: Interactive visualization of entities, claims, relations, citations, and document references.
graph.noData: No graph data in this workspace
graph.noDataHint: Upload source documents and run the compiler pipeline to generate entities, claims, and relations that populate the knowledge graph.

settings.title: Settings / MCP
settings.desc: Workspace provider settings, agent tokens, and MCP endpoint configuration.
settings.compilerDesc: LLM and embedding provider configuration for this workspace.
settings.agentTokensDesc: Workspace-scoped tokens for AI agents to access the vault via MCP or REST API.
settings.noTokens: No agent tokens. Create one to connect agents via MCP.
settings.tokenCreated: Token created! Copy it now — it won't be shown again.
settings.name: Name
settings.mcpDesc: Connect AI agents to this workspace via the Model Context Protocol.

activity.title: Activity / Revisions
activity.desc: Every wiki mutation is revisioned and attributable to human, agent, or system actors.
